text:
In this chapter:

(1) “Abutting property” means property abutting a street on which lighting improvements are made or proposed to be made.

(2) “Special benefit” means the amount of enhanced value that a property receives as a result of lighting improvements.

(3) “Street” includes a portion, not less than one block, of a street.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 315. Artificial Lighting
##### § 315.001 — Definitions

In this chapter:

    (1) “Abutting property” means property abutting a street on which lighting improvements are made or proposed to be made.

    (2) “Special benefit” means the amount of enhanced value that a property receives as a result of lighting improvements.

    (3) “Street” includes a portion, not less than one block, of a street.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: “Abutting property” means property abutting a street on which lighting improvements are made or proposed to be made.
“Special benefit” means the amount of enhanced value that a property receives as a result of lighting improvements.
“Street” includes a portion, not less than one block, of a street.
